station_name: HP Petrol Pump & CNG Filling Station
station_address: Sion Circle, 90-91, Sion - Trombay Rd, Next to, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400022
text: The  pump I visited was quite compact, making it a bit challenging to navigate out after refueling. Despite its size, the service was okay, and the availability of fuel made it a valuable stop for those seeking fuel in that area but  a bit of inconvenience in maneuvering due to its limited space.
